name: claude-hub
description: Personal Claude Code customizations: multi-agent teams, skills, agents, and commands

plugins.name: clean-web
plugins.description: A 4-agent pipeline for cleaning web projects: web-restructure → css-improver → html-improver → code-improver. Includes deterministic scripts (check.js, complexity, dependencies, dead code) for double coverage.

plugins.name: clean-data
plugins.description: A 4-agent pipeline for cleaning data projects: data-restructure, sql-improver, python-improver, pipeline-improver. Includes check_data.py (26 rules) and deterministic fix scripts.
